pr.title: Scaffold and harden AI futures trading bot
pr.body: ## Summary - Add FastAPI backend scaffold with trading engine, risk/safety controls, AI trade filter, CCXT exchange abstraction, all requested starter strategies, backtesting, database models, and migrations. - Add Docker Compose deployment for API, worker, frontend, PostgreSQL, and Redis. - Add React/Tailwind dashboard starter, frontend lockfile, database schema SQL, architecture/setup documentation, full production deployment guide, UpCloud runbook, and final UpCloud launch checklist. - Harden paper-trading deployment with API key auth, restricted CORS, localhost-only service bindings, Redis auth, required DB/Redis secrets, Alembic psycopg driver, non-root containers, runtime frontend API config, readiness checks, worker heartbeat/scanning loop, and persisted paper trades/dashboard data. - Set deployed frontend API base URL to `http://81.27.108.159:8000` and default dashboard API key to `testkey123`. - Ensure dashboard page load calls `/api/v1/dashboard/summary`, `/api/v1/positions`, and `/api/v1/trades` with `x-api-key: testkey123` by default. - Add visible API errors, loading states, manual retry/refresh, and exact demo fallback paper data when backend data is empty or unavailable: balance 10000, daily PnL 127.45, open PnL 42.10, win rate 62%, max drawdown 4.8%, BTC long / ETH short positions, and fake recent trades. - Add realistic paper trading simulation with fake execution, simulated balance, long/short positions, leverage-aware margin, live market price marking from exchange OHLCV, simulated stop-loss/take-profit closures, PnL updates, and trade history dashboard integration. - Add structured Telegram alerts for startup/shutdown, simulated trades, errors, warnings, strategy signals, worker loop failures, and fatal worker crashes. - Enforce production paper/sandbox mode by rejecting `LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true`, `PAPER_TRADING_ENABLED=false`, or `EXCHANGE_SANDBOX=false` at startup. - Merge latest `origin/main`; current conflicts were simple frontend/env config conflicts where `main` had the previous no-default-key version and this branch had the latest deployed dashboard fix. Resolved by keeping this branch's newer `testkey123`/demo fallback versions. ## Validation - `npm run build` in `frontend` - Merge resolution validation confirmed `http://81.27.108.159:8000`, `testkey123`, exact demo fallback metrics, BTC/ETH demo positions, and `x-api-key` are retained - Runtime config validation confirmed `frontend/public/config.js`, `frontend/docker-entrypoint.sh`, and `.env.example` retain the `testkey123` frontend key fallback - `git diff --check` - Previous validations include backend compile, route protection, paper simulation smoke tests, Telegram alert smoke tests, and production safety checks - `docker compose config` could not be run because Docker is not installed in this environment.
pr.author: detvildevestendk-code
